Global Variable# kCFErrorDomainCFNetwork

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFErrorDomainCFNetwork: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcferrordomaincfnetwork#Discussion)

Error domain that returns error codes specific to the CFNetwork stack.
